arts.ttl: Mark Robins makes Coventry City point as he is unveiled as new Stoke manager
arts.sum: Get the latest Coventry City news sent straight to your phone by joining our Sky Blues WhatsApp group. Mark Robins only had warm words for former club Coventry City as he was unveiled as the new Stoke manager this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Lewis Dobbin close to joining Norwich until the end of the season as Aston Villa call West Brom loan short after just ONE Championship start
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Bought in summer from Everton for £10million, Dobbin spent first half of the season on loan at West Brom, though he failed to make an impact for the Baggies.

Marcelino Nunez was the hero once again on New Year's Day as his second-half strike sealed a 1-0 away win for Norwich at Kenilworth Road. The victory against Luton means that Johannes Thorup's side ...
